name: qa-mcp-playwright
description: QA Automation toolkit demonstrating MCP (Model Context Protocol) integration — browser control with Playwright and Jira reporting, orchestrated by an AI agent.
author: N'Koy Otshudi <contact@nkoyotshudi.fr>

scripts.mcp:install: npm install -g jira-mcp && npx playwright install chromium
scripts.mcp:check: npx @playwright/mcp@latest --version && jira-mcp --version 2>/dev/null || echo 'jira-mcp not found — run: npm run mcp:install'
scripts.validate:config: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p='.vscode/mcp.json'; if(fs.existsSync(p)){console.log('✅ .vscode/mcp.json found')}else{console.error('❌ .vscode/mcp.json missing — see README')}"
scripts.demo: echo 'Open VS Code → Copilot Chat (Agent mode) → load .github/prompts/explore-and-report.prompt.md'
